Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Canvas & Preview

Isolated story rendering surface with dot-grid background, preview frame card, loading overlay, and fullscreen mode.

Canvas

The .cf-canvas fills the center column and uses a subtle dot-grid to visually distinguish the rendering surface from the chrome around it.

Button

Primary Button

Isolated story preview.

<section class="cf-canvas">
  <div class="cf-preview-frame">
    <div class="cf-preview-card">
      <!-- Story content here -->
      <button class="btn btn-primary">Button</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

Dark Canvas

Add .is-dark to .cf-canvas for a dark background when previewing dark-themed components. The grid adapts to white lines.

<section class="cf-canvas is-dark" data-bs-theme="dark">
  …
</section>

Preview Frame vs Preview Card

.cf-preview-frame — floating panel, centered in canvas. Max width 42rem.

Frame content

.cf-preview-card — flat bordered box for source code and embedded examples.

<button class="btn btn-primary">Click</button>

Loading Overlay

Shown during story navigation. Positioned inset:0 over the canvas. Toggle .is-visible to show it.

Story content behind overlay

Loading… 
<section class="cf-canvas">
  <div class="cf-preview-frame">…</div>

  <!-- Hidden by default; add .is-visible to show -->
  <div class="cf-loading-overlay is-visible" aria-live="polite">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
      <span class="visually-hidden">Loading…</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

Fullscreen Mode

Add .is-fullscreen to .cf-workbench to collapse the sidebar, docs panel, and addon panel — canvas fills the whole center. components.js toggles this via [data-cf-fullscreen].

<!-- Toggle fullscreen via data attribute -->
<button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary cf-icon-button"
        type="button" data-cf-fullscreen aria-label="Fullscreen" aria-pressed="false">
  <i class="bi bi-arrows-fullscreen"></i>
</button>

<!-- Or add the class manually -->
<div class="cf-workbench is-fullscreen">…</div>

Classes

ClassDescription
.cf-canvasGrid center for story. Dot-grid background. Add .is-dark for dark theme.
.cf-preview-frameElevated white panel (max-w 42rem) centered in the canvas. Uses cf-panel mixin.
.cf-preview-cardFlat bordered card inside frames. Used for source code blocks and inline examples.
.cf-loading-overlayAbsolute overlay over canvas. Hidden by default; add .is-visible to display.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
